issue: Backup stuck at 0% and never progresses
resolution: Restart the Vaultify desktop app and confirm the folder path has not changed. If it persists, clear the local cache via Settings > Diagnostics > Clear Cache.

issue: Backup repeatedly reports insufficient storage although quota appears available
resolution: Storage counters can lag up to 15 minutes. Wait 15 minutes and retry. If it still fails, sign out and sign back in to force a quota refresh.

issue: Files remain in syncing state indefinitely on one device
resolution: Pause Sync from the tray icon, wait 60 seconds, then resume to reset the sync worker.

issue: Frequent conflicted copy files are being created
resolution: The same file is likely being edited offline on multiple devices. Avoid simultaneous offline edits and enable Sync only when online if available.

issue: New shared link reports that it has already expired
resolution: Check Settings > Share > Default Expiry. Reset an invalid or zero-day default expiry to a positive value and recreate the link.

issue: Recipient cannot open a password-protected shared file
resolution: Confirm the password exactly, including case and accidental spaces. If it still fails, regenerate the share link.

issue: Invoice displays an unexpected currency after plan upgrade
resolution: Review workspace billing-region and invoice settings. If the displayed currency remains inconsistent, refresh billing information and contact Billing Support before payment.

issue: Downgrade to Free is blocked because storage exceeds the limit
resolution: Reduce usage below 5GB before completing the downgrade. The 14-day grace period permits temporary overage but does not remove the Free-plan quota requirement.

issue: 2FA QR code does not load
resolution: Disable content blockers for the Security page, refresh the page, and retry. If unresolved, try a supported browser before contacting Support.

issue: Account locked after repeated failed 2FA attempts
resolution: Wait 15 minutes after five failed attempts. Use a valid backup code if available, then retry authentication.

issue: SSO login loops back to the login page
resolution: Verify the SAML certificate and IdP metadata are current. Re-upload valid metadata under Settings > Security > SSO.

issue: CMEK-protected files inaccessible shortly after key rotation
resolution: Allow up to one hour for the new key to propagate before retiring the previous KMS key. Confirm the new key remains accessible to Vaultify.

issue: Camera Upload does not trigger on Android
resolution: Confirm Camera Upload permission is enabled and disable battery optimization for Vaultify in Android system settings.

issue: File marked Available offline is not accessible offline
resolution: Connect to Wi-Fi to allow the initial offline download to finish. Confirm the file appears in Settings > Mobile > Offline Files.

issue: Slack notifications do not arrive although the integration shows Connected
resolution: Reauthorize Slack under Settings > Integrations and verify the target channel and alert-routing configuration.

issue: Zapier trigger runs twice after one synchronized file edit
resolution: A synchronized edit can produce multiple events. Add a Zapier filter or deduplication step using file ID and event timestamp.

issue: Storage-capacity warning emails are not received
resolution: Check spam and junk folders and confirm the notification email under Settings > Notifications matches the intended address.

issue: Audit-log export remains at Preparing export
resolution: Large exports can take several minutes. Narrow the date range and retry before escalating.

issue: Backup History does not contain a file deleted two months ago
resolution: Check plan retention: Free retains 30 days and Pro 90 days. Recovery outside the applicable retention window is unavailable unless Enterprise retention preserved it.

issue: Sync paused automatically without user action
resolution: Free local disk space. Sync may pause when available local storage becomes critically low; resume Sync after sufficient space is available.

issue: External sharing option is missing
resolution: An Enterprise administrator may have disabled external sharing. Check Admin Console sharing policies or ask a workspace admin.

issue: Annual discount is not visible immediately after switching from monthly billing
resolution: Check the next invoice preview. Annual pricing adjustments may appear with the applicable billing cycle rather than as an immediate credit.

issue: Workspace Admin cannot transfer workspace ownership
resolution: Only the current Owner can transfer ownership through Admin Console > Users > Transfer Ownership.

issue: All devices were signed out after password reset
resolution: This is expected security behavior. Password changes invalidate existing sessions; sign in again on each device.

issue: Mobile app crashes immediately after an update
resolution: Clear the Vaultify app cache and relaunch. If the crash persists, update to the latest available build or reinstall the app.

issue: Google Workspace integration returns Permission denied
resolution: A Google Workspace administrator must approve the required Vaultify OAuth scopes in Google Admin Console > Security > API Controls.

issue: Duplicate notifications are generated for the same sync conflict
resolution: Confirm notification channels and active devices. Temporarily close the mobile app and retest; if duplicates persist, collect Diagnostics logs and contact Support.

issue: New-user invitation email never arrives
resolution: Verify the recipient address and mail-domain filtering, then resend from Admin Console > Users > Pending Invites.

issue: Backup folder shows red status but no visible error code
resolution: Open Settings > Diagnostics > View Logs to identify the underlying error code, then search the support knowledge base using that code.

issue: Large video files fail to sync while smaller files succeed
resolution: Enable Large File Sync beta under Settings > Sync > Beta Features for files over 10GB. v4.2 supports files up to 50GB.

issue: API returns HTTP 429 Too Many Requests
resolution: The default limit is 1,000 requests per hour per key. Implement exponential backoff or request a higher Enterprise limit.

issue: API key stops working immediately after key rotation
resolution: Rotation invalidates the previous key immediately. Update every integration with the newly generated key.

issue: Workspace needs to move existing data to another residency region
resolution: Region changes require a full support-assisted migration. Contact Vaultify Support to schedule the migration; self-service region changes are not supported.

issue: Auditor needs the latest SOC 2 or ISO 27001 documentation
resolution: Enterprise customers can request available compliance documents under Settings > Compliance > Documents or through their account manager.

issue: GDPR DSAR remains unresolved after the 30-day target
resolution: Escalate through the account manager or compliance support channel with the original request/ticket identifier.

issue: Severity-1 ticket has not received the Enterprise 1-hour target response
resolution: Confirm the ticket is correctly classified as Severity-1 and escalate through the dedicated Enterprise support channel.

issue: Files associated with a removed user appear missing from a team folder
resolution: User removal alone does not delete team-folder files. Check Activity/audit logs for subsequent deletion or movement by an authorized user.

issue: Editor cannot modify team-folder permissions
resolution: This is expected. Permission changes require Folder Manager or appropriate administrative access.

issue: Storage add-on appears as a separate charge and looks duplicated
resolution: Add-on storage is billed separately from the base plan. Compare invoice line-item SKUs and quantities before reporting a duplicate.

issue: Storage add-on cannot be removed
resolution: Reduce usage so it fits within the quota that will remain after removal, then retry the add-on change.

issue: Files remain after the configured retention period expires
resolution: Check whether Litigation Hold is enabled. Litigation Hold overrides normal retention and deletion rules.

issue: File cannot be deleted even by a high-privilege user
resolution: Check Litigation Hold. A hold blocks deletion regardless of normal folder permissions until an authorized admin removes it.

issue: Full workspace export does not contain expected audit logs
resolution: Ensure the full workspace export is initiated by an Enterprise Owner and that audit logs are included in the export scope.

issue: User was removed before their personal files were transferred
resolution: If the user is still available in Recently Removed, restore them temporarily, complete the file transfer, and then remove them again.

issue: Sync consumes too much office network bandwidth
resolution: Set upload and download caps under Settings > Sync > Bandwidth Limits.

issue: Large backup jobs interfere with real-time collaboration
resolution: Verify Backup Priority has not been manually set above Sync. Restore the default lower backup priority if appropriate.

issue: Linux installer fails because of dependency errors
resolution: Verify the distribution is supported and update the package-manager cache before installing the correct .deb or .rpm package.

issue: Desktop app does not launch after a macOS change
resolution: Confirm macOS 12+ and install the latest Vaultify desktop release. If supported and still failing, collect Diagnostics information and reinstall.

issue: A 30GB file fails to sync
resolution: Enable Large File Sync beta under Settings > Sync > Beta Features. Vaultify v4.2 supports Large File Sync up to 50GB.

issue: Slack critical-alert routing does not deliver Severity-1 alerts
resolution: Reauthorize Slack and verify the critical-alert channel under Settings > Integrations > Slack > Alert Routing.

issue: Enterprise workspace Owner account is inaccessible and no backup administrator can recover it
resolution: Contact Enterprise Support with proof of business ownership. Owner recovery requires identity verification outside normal self-service recovery.

issue: Expected SLA credit is not visible immediately after a missed response target
resolution: Eligible SLA credits are processed according to the Enterprise contract and billing cycle. Review the next invoice and escalate to the account manager if absent.

issue: Microsoft Teams integration is missing from Settings
resolution: Microsoft Teams integration requires Vaultify v4.0 or later. Update the product and check Settings > Integrations again.

issue: Offline files consume excessive mobile-device storage
resolution: Review Settings > Mobile > Offline Files and remove offline availability from files that are no longer needed.

issue: Write API request returns HTTP 403 when using a read-only key
resolution: Generate a new read-write API key under Settings > Developer > API Keys and update the integration.

issue: Manual Back up now action starts but immediately returns to idle
resolution: Confirm the selected folder still exists and is accessible to the Vaultify desktop app. Re-select the folder under Settings > Backup Sources if permissions or path changed.

issue: Backup repeatedly retries every 30 minutes without succeeding
resolution: Open Settings > Diagnostics and identify the error code. Resolve the underlying network, path, permission, or quota problem before the automatic retry can succeed.

issue: Sync changes are delayed across devices for several minutes
resolution: Verify all devices are online and Sync is not paused. Check bandwidth limits and restart the affected device's Vaultify app if the delay continues.

issue: Sync stops when local disk becomes almost full
resolution: Free local disk space used by the Vaultify cache and other applications, then resume Sync.

issue: User can view a shared folder but cannot upload files
resolution: Viewer and Commenter roles cannot upload. Change the user to Editor or Folder Manager if upload access is appropriate.

issue: External recipient can still access a link after a team member was removed
resolution: Removing a workspace user does not automatically invalidate public share links they created. A Folder Manager or admin should revoke the relevant link.

issue: Enterprise user cannot sign in with password after SSO-only policy is enabled
resolution: This is expected when SSO-only login is enforced. Use the configured SAML identity provider or ask an admin to review the workspace authentication policy.

issue: 2FA enforcement prevents a new Enterprise admin from completing setup
resolution: Complete 2FA enrollment during first sign-in. If enrollment cannot load, troubleshoot the Security page or contact an existing admin.

issue: API can list files but cannot create or modify shared links
resolution: Verify the API key has read-write scope. Read-only keys can retrieve data but cannot perform supported write operations.

issue: Integration intermittently fails near the hourly API limit
resolution: Track request usage and implement exponential backoff before reaching the 1,000 requests/hour/key default limit.

issue: Admin cannot find a self-service option to change the workspace region
resolution: This is expected. Data-residency changes require a Vaultify Support-managed full migration.

issue: Enterprise customer cannot find the Data Processing Agreement
resolution: Open Settings > Compliance > Documents or request the signed DPA from the account manager.

issue: Compliance reviewer needs file-sharing and permission-change evidence
resolution: Export the Admin Console audit log for the required date range; it records file-sharing activity and permission changes.

issue: Admin cannot transfer workspace ownership
resolution: Only the current workspace Owner can perform Transfer Ownership from Admin Console > Users.

issue: Audit export for a one-year range takes too long
resolution: Reduce the export to smaller date ranges and combine the resulting files for review.

issue: Enterprise retention setting does not delete files under Litigation Hold
resolution: This is expected. Litigation Hold overrides configured retention until the hold is removed.

issue: Admin wants to preserve a departing user's files before account removal
resolution: Transfer the user's personal files to another account or export them before removing the user.

issue: Camera Upload uses mobile data unexpectedly
resolution: Enable Wi-Fi-only Camera Upload under Settings > Mobile > Data Usage.

issue: Very large desktop backup folder cannot be backed up from mobile
resolution: Folders of 500GB or more are supported for backup only through the desktop application.

issue: Real-time Sync is slow after strict bandwidth caps were configured
resolution: Increase the upload/download limits under Settings > Sync > Bandwidth Limits or temporarily remove the caps.

issue: Pro user needs more than 1TB but does not need Enterprise features
resolution: Purchase one or more 500GB Pro storage add-ons under Billing instead of upgrading solely for capacity.

issue: Uploads paused after downgrade grace period ended
resolution: Reduce stored data to the new plan quota or upgrade the plan. The 14-day grace period has ended, so new uploads remain paused while usage exceeds quota.

issue: Storage warning appears at 90% even though uploads still work
resolution: This is expected. Vaultify warns at 90% and again at 100%; uploads are not necessarily blocked at the first warning.

issue: Subfolder permissions differ from the parent team folder
resolution: Check for a subfolder-level permission override. Vaultify supports permissions inherited from the folder or overridden per subfolder.

issue: Desktop installation fails because less than 2GB local disk space is available
resolution: Free at least 2GB of disk space for the Vaultify local cache and retry installation.
